dialogueChunks.intro: The tide has turned, {player_name}. {quest_threat} has finally relented, and {quest_stakes} are going to make it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Your persistence to {quest_action} in the face of one setback after another is what saved us. {quest_focus} is stabilized, and {quest_ally} is organizing the recovery.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes all it takes is one person who refuses to quit. You were that person.

playerResponses.text: Misfortune does not last forever. Glad to see you through it.
Please invest in better infrastructure after this.
You earned this recovery. Own it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I think our luck has finally changed. {quest_threat} is behind us, and {quest_stakes} survived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} still needs work, but the crisis has passed. {quest_ally} says the worst is over, and I believe it this time.
dialogueChunks.outro: You fought against cruel fate itself and won. That is no small thing.

playerResponses.text: Luck had nothing to do with it. You worked hard.
Let us hope the worst really is over this time.

dialogueChunks.intro: Against all odds, {player_name}, we survived. {quest_threat} threw everything at us, and we are still standing.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes} are secured. {quest_focus} can be rebuilt properly now. {quest_ally} has already drawn up plans to prevent this from happening again.
dialogueChunks.outro: When misfortune came knocking, you answered the door and sent it packing. We are grateful beyond words.

playerResponses.text: Build back stronger. That is the best revenge against fate.
Glad to hear you have a prevention plan.
Take care of each other. That is all.
